# Acknowledgements

I'd like to thank the following projects and people for their help and inspiration:

- [@colinhacks](https://github.com/colinhacks) - The creator of [Zod](https://zod.dev/) and [Pullfrog](https://pullfrog.com/). Colin's work on Zod and tRPC has been a massive inspiration for my OSS journey, and I regularly reference his codebases. We're also proud to use Pullfrog to empower ArkEnv's development by bringing top-shelf AI agents [directly into our GitHub workflows](https://github.com/yamcodes/arkenv/blob/main/.github/workflows/pullfrog.yml).
- [ArkType](https://arktype.dev/) - ArkEnv exists thanks to the brilliance of ArkType. If you haven't checked it out yet, you're missing out—it's seriously amazing. Huge shoutout to its creator, [David Blass](https://github.com/ssalbdivad), who is an absolute legend.
- [znv](https://github.com/lostfictions/znv) - Basically ArkEnv but for [Zod](https://zod.dev/). This was the initial inspiration for the project.
- [vite-plugin-validate-env](https://github.com/Julien-R44/vite-plugin-validate-env) - The inspiration behind our Vite plugin.
- [T3 Env](https://env.t3.gg/) - The inspiration for our API. These guys are doing a lot of things right, and for a platform-agnostic solution, you can't go wrong with T3 Env. Also, a big shoutout to [Theo Browne](https://github.com/t3dotgg) for being a major inspiration to devs on YouTube.

Thank you 🙏

Yam
